case_title: FENTRESS HILL VS. 2801 JACKSON STREET ASSOCIATES

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT 2801 JACKSON STREET ASSOCIATES
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HILL, FENTRESS AS TO DEFENDANT 2801 JACKSON STREET ASSOCIATES

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-16-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-16-2018 BY PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF FENTRESS HILL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT 2801 JACKSON STREET ASSOCIATES IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY VINCE ALVARENGA, MANAGEMENT AGENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-29-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT 2801 JACKSON STREET ASSOCIATES
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY HILL, FENTRESS 2801 JACKSON STREET ASSOCIATES
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-16-2018 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,286.68 FILED BY HILL, FENTRESS AS TO DEFENDANT 2801 JACKSON STREET ASSOCIATES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-16-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HILL, FENTRESS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT 2801 JACKSON STREET ASSOCIATES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
